headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms today — use the open space to drive the 'no ground truth' evaluations design doc forward.

Salesforce INVALID_LOGIN error and Snowflake empty password — request credential reset

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations or high-priority cases.
Snowflake metrics connection is broken (empty password) — no product telemetry or funnel data available.
AE-1079 has no due date set; risk of it drifting without a committed target — consider setting one today.

outcomes.business_impact: No business-impacting actions completed yet today; restoring Salesforce and Snowflake access is the fastest path to regaining visibility on customer escalations and adoption metrics.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption data is currently unavailable; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the highest-leverage adoption-driving work on the board.

slack_summary: Quiet day: no meetings, no emails, no Slack activity — use it to make real progress on the no-ground-truth evaluations design doc (AE-1079), which is your only active Jira ticket and a key 26.4 deliverable. Top urgent items: (1) get the design doc into a reviewable state and sync with Jordan/Dragos on scope, and (2) file a ticket or ping IT to fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you're not blind on metrics and escalations. Zero meetings today.
